children.text: scientifically proven practices for reducing microbial pathogens on fresh produce; and
methods of reducing the threat of cross-contamination of fresh produce through sanitary handling practices.

children.heading: Cooperation
children.label: b Cooperation
children.text: The Secretary may carry out the education program in cooperation with public and private partners.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary to carry out this section $1,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2008 through 2023, to remain available until expended.
